title: cyperus longi-involucratus
intro: Cyperus longi-involucratus, also known as Cyperus tenuiculmis, is a perennial herb that belongs to the sedge family and is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus longi-involucratus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Cyperus longi-involucratus is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
